name: Amate. // Oxi
description:
Starving in circles, perpetual state of possession.

"How far would you go to make people better?"

!!️he is not nice and EXTREMELY fucked up so take this as a warning please!!️

this one is a different kind of experiment pov, not physical but mental 😃 another oc

so that you know what you're getting into: Oxi runs an isolated research facility that claims to be running "volunteer trials" to remove trauma from the brain and improve humanity. however, unbeknownst to the public, Oxi's experiments are about stripping away emotions, memories, and/or entire identities. He believes he's saving the world by "refining" humanity.
